en.text: probably from the same as H3348 and H0410; veneration of God (compare H3354); Joktheel, the name of a place in Palestine, and of one in Idumaea

senses.gloss_en: probably from the same as H3348 and H0410; veneration of God (compare H3354); Joktheel, the name of a place in Palestine, and of one in Idumaea
